recommended.song_name: Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
Tuning: Standard

[Intro] 

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch] 
   I guess now it's time for me to give up[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]              
   I feel it's time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
   Got a picture of you beside me [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]       
   Got a lipstick mark still on [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]                
   Your coffee cup[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]                         
   Oh yeah[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Gm[/ch]    
   Got a fist of pure emotion[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]        
   Got a head of shattered dreams[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm/C[/ch]            
   Gotta leave it, gotta leave it[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                          
   All behind now[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]              
        Whatever I said, whatever I did I[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                                 
        Didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]              
        I just want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]                            
        Whatever I'm wrong just tell me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                     
        The song and I'll sing it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]              
        You'll be right and understood[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, I want you back for good[/tab]


[Verse]     
  
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
   Unaware but underlined[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
   I figured out the story (no, no)[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
   It wasn't good (no, no)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch] 
   But in the corner of my mind[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch] 
   I celebrated glory[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]            
   But that was not to be[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]           
   In the twist of separation [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
   You excelled at being free[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]                             
   Can't you find, (can't you find) [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm/C[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]                  
   A little room inside for me[/tab]

  
[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]              
        Whatever I said, whatever I did I[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                                 
        Didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]              
        I just want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]                            
        Whatever I'm wrong just tell me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                     
        The song and I'll sing it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]              
        You'll be right and understood[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, I want you back for good[/tab]

   
[Bridge]    
                                 
[tab]  [ch]Bb7[/ch]              [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]Bb7[/ch]                [ch]F/A[/ch]           
   And we'll be together, this time is forever[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]                        [ch]F/A[/ch]                           
   We'll be fighting and forever we will be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Dm/C[/ch]                               
   So complete in our love[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb7[/ch]        [ch]F/A[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]          
   We will never be uncovered again[/tab]

  
[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]              
        Whatever I said, whatever I did I[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                                 
        Didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]              
        I just want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, want you back for good[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]                            
        Whatever I'm wrong just tell me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                     
        The song and I'll sing it[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]              
        You'll be right and understood[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
        Want you back, want you back, I want you back for good[/tab]
